label: Serve / Solve / Sell (starter)
prompt: Create a concise, professional response that serves the customer, solves the stated issue, and sells the appropriate value-add. Include next steps.

label: Denial reason probe
prompt: Ask targeted questions to identify likely denial reasons. Keep it respectful and brief.

label: Smart Drop handoff
prompt: Summarize the case, provide precise next steps, and craft a smooth handoff note to the next team.

label: Deep audit checklist
prompt: List the minimal, verifiable steps to audit this case end-to-end. Use bullet points.

label: Carrier specifics: Verizon/AT&T/Cricket
prompt: Include carrier-specific caveats and T&C touchpoints applicable to Verizon, AT&T, and Cricket.
